title: She Went As Quiet As The Dew
content:
She went as quiet as the dew
    From a familiar flower.
    Not like the dew did she return
    At the accustomed hour!

    She dropt as softly as a star
    From out my summer's eve;
    Less skilful than Leverrier
    It's sorer to believe!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "She Went As Quiet As The Dew", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
